LAW AND MOTION 302, MTN FOR ORDER OF DISCHARGE AND AWARD OF COSTS AND ATTORNEYS FEES AND FOR A DISMISSAL OF PLAINTIFF STAKEHOLDER IS CONTINUED FROM JAN-08-2015 TO JAN-23-2015, AT 9:30 AM, IN DEPT. 302, TO GIVE MOVING PARTY THE OPPORTUNITY TO COMPLY WITH LOCAL RULE 2.6B. MOVING PARTY MUST DELIVER COURTESY COPIES OF THE MOVING AND REPLY PAPERS TO DEPARTMENT 302, WITH A COVER LETTER STATING THE NEW HEARING DATE, NO LATER THAN JANUARY 8, 2015 AT 4:00 PM OR THE MOTION WILL BE DENIED. ANY EXHIBIT MUST BE SEPARATED BY AN EXHIBIT TAB PER CRC 3.1110(F). THE COURT HAS COURTESY COPIES OF THE OPPOSITION PAPERS. JUDGE: ERNEST H. GOLDSMITH, CLERK: SEAN KANE, NOT REPORTED; DEPT. 302. LAW AND MOTION, 302, MTN FOR ORDER OF DISCHARGE AND AWARD OF COSTS AND ATTORNEYS FEES AND FOR A DISMISSAL OF PLAINTIFF STAKEHOLDER IS DENIED. THE PARTIES STIPULATED AND THE COURT ORDERED ON JUNE 26, 2014, FOR ACIC TO RELEASE $11,000 TO PLAINTIFF. THE INSTANT MOTION IS INCONSISTENT WITH THAT ORDER. PLAINTIFF'S COUNSEL SHALL PREPARE AND SUBMIT A PROPOSED ORDER. THE PROPOSED ORDER CAN INCLUDE LANGUAGE REGARDING THE RELEASE OF FUNDS DEPOSITED WITH THE COURT TO PLAINTIFFS, BUT PLAINTIFFS COUNSEL MUST RESEARCH THE PROPER PROCEDURE, AND CITE THE RELEVANT AUTHORITY IN THE PROPOSED ORDER. MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, having been assigned from The Presiding Judge Department 206 for Entry of Judgment. Short Cause Trial/No appearance by Defendant(s).

Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn For Order Of Discharge And Award Of Costs And Attorneys Fees And For A Dismissal Of Plaintiff Stakeholder
Off Calendar Jan-23-2015 Denied
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES: Atty. GEORGE W. WOLFF, Tel No. (415) 788-1881 appearing for Plaintiff Pat Lam;
Atty. ROBER J. STROJ of Lanak & Hanns, P.C., Tel No. (714) 550-0418 appearing telephonically for Defendant American Contractors Indemnity Company.

RULING - A R G U E D - DEFENDANT AMERICAN CONTRACTORS INDEMNITY COMPANY'S Motion For Order Of Discharge And Award Of Costs And Attorneys Fees And For A Dismissal Of Plaintiff Stakeholder is denied. The parties stipulated and the court ordered on June 26, 2014, for ACIC to release $11,000 to plaintiff. The instant motion is inconsistent with that order. Plaintiff's counsel shall prepare and submit a proposed order. The proposed order can include language regarding the release of funds deposited with the Court to Plaintiffs, but Plaintiffs counsel must research the proper procedure, and cite the relevant authority in the proposed order. Judge: A. James Robertson, II; Clerk: Sean Kane; Reporter: Melanie Dawn Gheno, CSR #7489 (302/AJR)

Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn For Order Of Discharge And Award Of Costs And Attorneys Fees And For A Dismissal Of Plaintiff Stakeholder
Off Calendar Jan-08-2015 Continued To Jan-23-15 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANT AMERICAN CONTRACTORS INDEMNITY COMPANY'S Motion for Order of Discharge and Award of Costs and Attorneys Fees and for a Dismissal of Plaintiff Stakeholder is continued to January 23, 2015 to give moving party the opportunity to comply with Local Rule 2.6B. Moving party must deliver courtesy copies of the moving and reply papers to Department 302, with a cover letter stating the new hearing date, no later than January 8, 2015 at 4:00 pm or the motion will be denied. Any exhibit must be separated by an exhibit tab per CRC 3.1110(f). The court has courtesy copies of the opposition papers. Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith, Clerk: Sean Kane, Not Reported. (302/EHG)
